title: Terrain Configuration
description: Adopter-facing configuration. Stable from v0.2.0. Defaults work with no file; this schema is purely opt-in overrides.

version.description: Schema version. Stable from v0.2.0; one-cycle deprecation cycle on changes.

rules.description: Per-rule overrides. Keys are rule IDs without the 'terrain/' prefix (e.g., 'regression/eval-regression'). Values are either a bare severity or a tuning block.

paths.description: Glob patterns of paths to exclude from all rule evaluation.

rules.description: Per-rule path ignores. Keys are rule IDs; values are glob patterns.

framework.description: Eval framework wiring. 'gauntlet' is JSON-format-compatible ingestion, not a runtime adapter.

baselines_dir.description: Directory containing eval baselines for regression comparison.

surfaces.description: Adopter-declared AI/ML surface descriptions. Generated by `terrain describe`; committed alongside code.

on_terrain_error.description: Behavior when Terrain itself crashes mid-run. 'block' (default): status check red, gate fails closed. 'pass': status check green, gate fails open (advisory mode).

redact_source.description: If true, source code excerpts are redacted from emitted artifacts (JUnit, GH annotations). Diagnostics still emit but without code quotes. For highly-sensitive repos.

explain.description: CLI explain (LLM enrichment) configuration. NEVER read in CI; CLI-only.

provider.description: LLM provider. 'ollama' is the security-friendly default (local inference). 'none' disables enrichment entirely.

endpoint.description: Provider endpoint URL. For 'ollama': http://localhost:11434. For 'custom': adopter's OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

model.description: Provider-specific model identifier. For Ollama: 'llama3.2:3b' recommended default.

api_key_env.description: Environment variable name holding the API key for hosted providers. Never embed keys in terrain.yaml.

threshold.description: For regression/* rules: max acceptable metric delta.

threshold_p95_ms.description: For performance/latency-regression: P95 latency budget in milliseconds.

samples_per_run.description: For stochastic LLM evals: number of samples per run for statistical aggregation. Default 1 (deterministic).

seed_strategy.description: For stochastic LLM evals: seed-pinning strategy.

confidence_alpha.description: For multi-sample comparison: alpha for confidence interval (default 0.05 = 95% CI).

base_strategy.description: For regression/eval-regression: how to obtain the base SHA's eval result. 'cached' reads from .terrain/baselines/; 'rerun' re-evaluates at base SHA; 'from-ci-artifact' fetches from a previous CI run.

extended_period_days.description: For hygiene/permanently-skipped: threshold for 'extended' skip duration. Default 30.

scope.description: For rules with file-scan cost: limit scan scope. Default 'changed_files' to bound runtime.

pii_engine.description: For security/pii-in-eval: detection engine. 'native' is Go-built-in (no Python dependency). 'presidio' invokes Microsoft Presidio via subprocess (higher recall on names/addresses; requires Python).

description.description: Plain-language description of what this surface does. Consumed by diagnostic templates.

type.description: Surface type. Closed enumeration at v1; adding new types is a schema-version bump.

file_path.description: Optional: path to the file where the surface is defined.

model.description: Optional: model identifier (for type=llm or type=prediction_service).
